positive: A stylized, symmetrical arrangement of celestial and floral motifs, featuring crescent moons, constellations, geometric mandalas, and blooming bioluminescent flowers. The composition should be highly detailed yet clean, with a strong central focal point. Use a deep cosmic indigo, ethereal mint green, and shimmering gold palette. The style should be intricate line art combined with vaporwave psychedelia, perfect for a repeating apparel print. Clean silhouettes, high contrast, minimal shadows, vector art quality, isolated on a white or transparent background.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low quality, artifacts, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logo, brand, copyrighted, messy lines, smudge, grainy, poor composition
